name: Banana Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (163°C). Have a ready 10-inch tube pan with a removable bottom. Do not grease.
2. Add cream of tartar to egg whites and beat with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form. Do not overbeat.
3. In another bowl, stir flour, sugar, and baking powder until blended. Make a well in the center and add the egg yolks, mashed bananas, and oil. Gradually add water to bourbon to make 1/3 cup. Add to the well with vanilla.
4. Beat ingredients in the well with an electric mixer, gradually beating in dry ingredients from around the edge, just until you have a smooth batter. Pour 1/3 batter over whites and quickly, but gently, stir until the batter and whites are blended. Repeat twice with remaining batter. Pour into the tube pan.
5. Bake for 55 minutes. Do not open the oven door or the cake may fall. Increase the oven to 350°F (177°C) and bake an additional 10-15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Hang the cake upside down and cool completely. Remove from pan.
7. For glaze: Heat bourbon and milk to a simmer. Stir in confectioner's sugar until dissolved. Immediately drizzle over top and sides of cake. Let cool until the glaze sets before garnishing. Cut with a long serrated knife.
